summary: Iteration 165 — signature flow + cache invalidation + By-Term blocking regression. Backend pytest 8/8 PASSED (session creation persists items/subtotal/discount/partial_paid/invoice_number, status returns signature_url field, public submit -> signed, manager-PIN bypass works, 403 on bad PIN, public /view returns context, receivables-summary regression OK). SignaturePage UI verified: items list, Subtotal, Total Credit Amount, 'Approve & Submit' button label, canvas all render correctly. CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG FOUND in RequestSignatureDialog terminal/inline mode: submitInlineSignature posts {signature_data: dataUrl} but backend /api/signatures/submit/{token} expects key 'signature'. Reproduced via curl: POST returns 400 'Signature data is required'. This breaks the entire terminal flow (TerminalSales). CropCreditTypeDialog By-Term blocking verified by code review: handleConfirmByTerm() toasts 'Cannot create a By Term credit while a Charged-to-Crop credit is active' with description and the button is also disabled+opacity-50+cursor-not-allowed when blockInfo.reason==='active_crop_credit'. Cache invalidation export verified in CustomerBalanceBadge.js (invalidateBalanceCache used by PaymentsPage on success).

ui_bugs.issue: submitInlineSignature() POST body uses key 'signature_data' but backend POST /api/signatures/submit/{token} requires key 'signature'. Result: 400 'Signature data is required' on every terminal submit. Confirmed via curl. Web POS QR mode is unaffected (SignaturePage uses correct key 'signature').
ui_bugs.fix: Change body: JSON.stringify({ signature_data: dataUrl, signer_name: ... }) to body: JSON.stringify({ signature: dataUrl, signed_at: new Date().toISOString(), user_agent: navigator.userAgent })

frontend_request_signature_dialog_inline.BUG: Wrong payload key 'signature_data' instead of 'signature' on line 174 → 400 every time

frontend_crop_credit_type_dialog_by_term.verified_via: code review (UI flow blocked by branch-selection prerequisite)
frontend_crop_credit_type_dialog_by_term.toast_message_line_114: Cannot create a By Term credit while a Charged-to-Crop credit is active.
frontend_crop_credit_type_dialog_by_term.toast_description_line_116: Active season ends {seasonEnd} ... Settle the crop credit first, or add this sale to the active season instead.
frontend_crop_credit_type_dialog_by_term.label_line_212: 'Locked — crop credit active' replaces standard description

action_items: [CRITICAL] Fix /app/frontend/src/components/RequestSignatureDialog.js line 174: change `JSON.stringify({ signature_data: dataUrl, signer_name: invoice?.customer_name || '' })` to `JSON.stringify({ signature: dataUrl, signed_at: new Date().toISOString(), user_agent: navigator.userAgent })`. Without this fix, terminal inline signature submission ALWAYS returns 400 and the entire TerminalSales mandatory-signature flow is broken.

[Optional] Consider adding `signer_name` field support to backend POST /api/signatures/submit/{token} if desired — currently the public endpoint stores user_agent/signed_at_client/ip in signer_info but ignores signer_name.
critical_code_review_comments: RequestSignatureDialog.js inline mode payload mismatch is the only blocking bug — easy 1-line fix.
RequestSignatureDialog.js line 116 polling effect correctly skips when mode='inline' (inline submits directly), matches spec.

SignaturePage.js correctly handles ctx.subtotal, ctx.discount, ctx.partial_paid as conditional rows; uses != null for subtotal so '0' value still shows. Discount and partial_paid use > 0 — intentional, hides zero-rows. Good.
Backend /api/signatures/status correctly generates a fresh presigned URL per poll (3600s TTL) — keeps cashier preview valid.
Backend POST /api/signatures/session correctly coerces subtotal/discount/partial_paid to float OR None — handles missing keys cleanly.
CropCreditTypeDialog.js handleConfirmByTerm logic is sound: toast.error + early return prevents onConfirm from being called, plus button is disabled at the DOM level → defense-in-depth.
Note (pre-existing, not new): SignaturePage uses native browser date display via toLocaleDateString — not a regression, design consistent with the rest of public mobile pages.
seed_data_creation: Created several signature_sessions with TEST_ prefixed customer_name during pytest. Auto-expire after 5 minutes; not removed by tests but harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes line 174 of RequestSignatureDialog.js, you can verify by simulating the terminal submit via curl: POST /api/signatures/submit/{token} with {"signature":"data:image/png;base64,<bytes>"} should return 200. The full UI e2e for terminal mode needs touch/mouse drawing on the canvas which is unreliable in headless playwright — code-review verification + curl-level smoke is the pragmatic approach. For CropCreditTypeDialog By-Term test, you must (1) select a branch via the branch selector first or sales checkout will toast 'Select a branch', (2) the dialog only opens when payment_type=credit is selected in the checkout modal — selector for that varies by route /sales-new vs /sales.
rca of the issue: Bug in RequestSignatureDialog.submitInlineSignature: developer used the older payload shape {signature_data, signer_name} while backend POST /api/signatures/submit/{token} (routes/signatures.py line 272) reads `data.get('signature', '')`. Mismatched key → empty string → backend raises HTTPException(400, 'Signature data is required'). Reproduction: curl -X POST $BASE/api/signatures/submit/$TOKEN -d '{"signature_data":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgo="}' returns 400. Mitigation: rename the key on the frontend (1-line change). Identical SignaturePage.js (line 76) uses the correct key 'signature' and works — that's why QR mode is fine but inline/terminal mode is broken.
